content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

August 8, 2003

Laurence S. Zakson
Reich, Adell, Crost & Cvitan
3550 Wilshire Boulevard, Suite 2000
Los Angeles, CA 90010

Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance
Our File No. W-03-136

Dear Mr. Zakson:

Pursuant to your written request dated August 6, 2003, this letter confirms that you are withdrawing your request for informal assistance regarding the campaign contribution provisions of the Political Reform Act, as they pertain to the transfer of funds from the federal campaign committee of a member of Congress to that member’s state candidate-controlled committee for elective state office.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Kenneth L. Glick
Counsel, Legal Division
